title: これ、スタックしている？ • 現在タスクは thin-core を維持したまま drift 耐性と自動反 映を次段まで進めること として扱います。まず現行の lane 可 用性を current-run で確認し、6 本の active lane を立てて から実装に入ります。 • Spawned Feynman [reviewer] └ [phase:plan] [family:layering] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: continue Kernel hardening without increasing always-loaded con...
summary_text: PASS for overall structure (boundary, scope, constraints, failure modes are coherent and non-conflicting). - Missing proof: `tests pass` is underspecified; acceptance should name exact regression set (e.g., `test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh`, `test-fugue-harness-hook.sh`, or minimal required subset) and the required assertions, not generic "tests pass". - Missing proof: `launchctl loaded interval matches repo default` is not directly bound to a named contract file/line; require explicit source-of-truth mapping (e.g., `bootstrap-kernel-task-completion-backup-agent.sh: INTERVAL_SECONDS=600` + launchd inspection). - Missing proof: `no persistent lock_busy noise` lacks a measurable threshold (time window or count), so cannot be falsified deterministically. - Missing proof: log evidence can show stale legacy entries (旧 path / old error chatter) unless explicitly scoped to "post-change window", so current acceptance may overstate cleanliness.
